notes: Dominant fix type is golden file drift (automatable). make update-golden already exists. Turn avg 119.5 vs 15-20 target.
All 9 runs flagged resource_heavy + poor_agentic_control. Outlier 4.2M/62-turn run from PR review test complexity. Per-request cost ~64K stable, so turn reduction is primary lever.
Root cause: gh aw compile * pattern blocks /tmp/ absolute paths. 2/2 runs show identical 129-131 turn failure → source code fallback. Fix tool pattern to allow /tmp/*.md paths.

All 9 non-trivial runs flagged partially_reducible (50-96% data-gathering turns). Pre-fetching PR diff + file list in bash pre-steps is primary lever. Also remove repos toolset and 3 unused bash tools.

45% failure rate across 11 runs. Runaway 103-turn failed run consumed 9.1M tokens (75% of daily total). Primary lever: reduce timeout-minutes 15→10 + remove Serena import (unused Go LSP for .md optimization). No max-turns available for Copilot engine.
